name: Hudbay Minerals Inc.
content: Hudbay Minerals is a diversified mining company primarily focused on copper production with long-life operations in Canada and Peru. The company is also advancing a significant pipeline of copper growth projects in the United States, including the Copper Mountain expansion and the Rosemont project. Hudbay is a mid-tier producer that offers attractive leverage to copper prices and the ongoing shift toward Western-allied mineral supply.
